vBRIEFInfo.author: overdeck/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-2146: Decompose src/lib/agents.ts (4572 lines) into focused modules

plan.title: Decompose src/lib/agents.ts (4572 lines) into focused modules
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-8

narratives.Problem: src/lib/agents.ts is 4572 lines (73 exported symbols + ~65 internal helpers/module-state) — the largest remaining backend god file and a hot path (spawn, resume, recover, message). It sits over the 1000-line file-size ceiling and is baselined as known debt. A prior pass extracted only 5 small modules (activity/delivery/queries/runtime-state/termination); the bulk remains.
narratives.Proposal: Pure relocation behind a thin re-export barrel. Extract cohesive clusters from src/lib/agents.ts into new src/lib/agents/*.ts submodules (each < 1000 lines), and keep src/lib/agents.ts as a barrel that re-exports every symbol so all 64 call sites and every test resolve unchanged. No logic edits, no renamed exports, no signature changes. Extract foundation-first (agent-state owns Role + AgentState) so no submodule imports from the barrel (which would create a runtime ESM cycle). Run typecheck + lint + full suite after every seam; a frozen export-surface snapshot test is the no-loss audit gate.
narratives.NonGoals:
- No logic changes, bug fixes, or behavior changes of any kind — pure moves + re-exports.
- No renamed or removed exports; the barrel's public named-export set is identical before and after.
- No edits to call sites that import src/lib/agents.ts (all 64 stay unchanged).
- No edits to the existing submodules' (queries/runtime-state/delivery/activity/termination) barrel-import paths.
- No new explicit `any`; no new execSync or other sync primitives.
- No splitting beyond what the 1000-line ceiling requires.
- Not addressing other god files in the codebase-health backlog (separate issues).

autoDecisions.summary: Reuse the existing src/lib/agents/ directory as the extraction target.
autoDecisions.rationale: It already holds 5 prior extractions and the barrel already re-exports from it; this is the established pattern, not a fresh convention.

autoDecisions.summary: Role type + isRole move into agents/agent-state.ts (the type foundation); barrel re-exports them.
autoDecisions.rationale: Every consumer module needs Role/AgentState; co-locating them with state CRUD gives one dependency-free foundation and lets existing submodules keep importing Role/AgentState from the barrel via re-export.

autoDecisions.summary: Split spawn (~1320 lines) into spawn-prep.ts + spawn.ts, and recovery (~919 lines) into resume.ts + recovery.ts, unconditionally.
autoDecisions.rationale: Both regions exceed the 1000-line ceiling once a module import header is added; splitting at the spawnRun / restartAgent boundaries yields cohesive, sub-ceiling files.

autoDecisions.summary: Add a frozen export-surface snapshot test as the first bead.
autoDecisions.rationale: The additive-refactor / no-loss rule requires a mechanical audit gate; freezing the barrel's named-export set proves the public surface is preserved across every seam.

autoDecisions.summary: Leave existing submodule barrel-import paths untouched; new modules import siblings directly.
autoDecisions.rationale: Existing submodules already import foundation symbols from the barrel and keep working via re-export; editing them is unnecessary churn. New modules import leaves directly to avoid a barrel runtime cycle.

autoDecisions.summary: Full suite per seam = npx vitest run --configLoader runner (0 failed).
autoDecisions.rationale: Matches the command named in the issue body; the frontend-augmented npm test is broader than required here.

items.title: Add no-loss export-surface snapshot test for the agents barrel

narrative.Action: Before any code moves, add src/lib/__tests__/agents-barrel-exports.test.ts. It imports `* as barrel` from '../agents.js', and asserts Object.keys(barrel).sort() deep-equals a frozen literal array captured from the current barrel. This is the no-loss audit gate every later seam must keep green.

items.title: Test file src/lib/__tests__/agents-barrel-exports.test.ts exists and contains a frozen literal array of the barrel's current named exports (captured from `import * as barrel`).
The test asserts the live barrel's sorted export keys deep-equal the frozen array, and the snapshot test passes against the unmodified barrel with 0 failed.
`npm run typecheck` passes and `npm run lint` passes with the new test present.
Extract agent state foundation into agents/agent-state.ts

narrative.Action: Move the Role type, isRole, AgentState interface, and the full state-persistence cluster (getAgentDir, getAgentStateFilePath, wipeAgentStateDirs, getAgentState(Sync), writeAgentStateJsonSync, saveAgentState(Sync), pause/troubled/failure functions, isAgentPaused/Troubled, markAgentRunning/StoppedState, GOVERNOR_SLOT_PAUSE_REASON_PREFIX, SESSION_EXITED_BEFORE_KICKOFF, __testInternals, and their private helpers + toAgentFsError) verbatim into src/lib/agents/agent-state.ts. Re-export all public symbols from the barrel. This is the type/state foundation every later module imports from './agent-state.js'.

items.title: Extraction produces src/lib/agents/agent-state.ts (under 1000 lines per the file-size guard) exporting Role, isRole, AgentState, and the state-persistence symbols listed in the PRD; declarations are byte-identical moves (no logic edits).
src/lib/agents.ts re-exports every moved symbol and the export-surface snapshot test (wi-0) passes with 0 differences.
agent-state.ts imports nothing from '../agents.js' (no barrel back-import); `npm run typecheck` exits 0.
`npm run lint` exits 0 (file-size guard reports agent-state.ts under ceiling) and `npx vitest run --configLoader runner` reports 0 failed.

Re-export both from the barrel. The three pre-existing explicit `any` move with this code, so add spawn.ts to eslint-any-allowlist.json.

Confirm thin barrel + ratchet the file-size baseline

narrative.Action: After all extractions, confirm src/lib/agents.ts contains only imports + re-export statements (no remaining domain logic). Update the src/lib/agents.ts entry in scripts/file-size-baseline.txt to its new (smaller) line count to ratchet the baseline down. Run the final full gate.
